title: GATE Agent Discovered Event (C17)
description: Emitted by the C17 Discovery plane when an agent-like workload is detected that is not present in the C04 inventory. Routes to the C04 Lifecycle service for enrol / terminate / exception remediation.

workload_identity.description: Workload identity observed making the discovered call (SPIFFE ID, cloud IAM principal, or service-account ARN).

detection_boundary.description: Which C17 mechanism raised this candidate.

classification_confidence.description: Confidence that the candidate is agentic (LLM-driven) rather than a deterministic service.

evidence_payload.description: Detector-specific signals: observed call patterns, asset signals, identity-mismatch records. Schema is detector-defined; must include detector_id and detector_version.

candidate_hash.description: Stable hash over workload_identity + detection_boundary + canonicalised evidence_payload. Used to deduplicate and to correlate with the C17 remediation outcome.

classifier_bundle_hash.description: Signed classifier rule-set bundle hash. Required so the discovery decision is replayable (C10).
